violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and front area were blocked by boxes, milk crates, and trash can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
Food observed stored in the market less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: tray beneath milk in walk in cooler plastic beverage slides in walk in cooler shelves in walk in New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. Dumpster enclosures must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The floors in the market beneath shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The walk in is in poor repair, with water accumulating on the floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
